tasks.title: GET /api/directory/snapshot endpoint with delta + Ed25519 signature + 304/403 semantics (S5-01 bridge side)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/006-android-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/android-directory-sync.feature}. SECOND: implement internal/api/directory_snapshot.go. (REQ-500/501) GET /api/directory/snapshot?since=N returns contacts where updated_at > N (full when N=0/missing). (REQ-502/503) response is signed JSON via internal/keystore signing key. (REQ-505) revoked pairing → 403. (REQ-506/507) Last-Modified header + If-Modified-Since → 304. Add @Summary/@Tags/@Router. Tests cover full/delta + signing + 304/403.

tasks.title: MQTT directory/changed + directory/revoked publication on contact mutation (S5-01 bridge side)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/006-android-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: hook into the existing directory mutation paths (internal/api/directory.go from spec/002 T-004). (REQ-508) on every POST/PUT/DELETE /api/directory/contacts, publish a new-version integer to meshsat/bridge/{bridge_id}/directory/changed. (REQ-514) on signing-pubkey revocation, publish revoked contact_id list to meshsat/bridge/{bridge_id}/directory/revoked. Use the existing bus.MessageBus. Tests cover publication-on-mutation.

tasks.title: Cross-bridge handoff: export + import + TTL + replay protection + audit (S5-03)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/006-android-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/android-directory-sync.feature}. SECOND: implement internal/api/contact_handoff.go. (REQ-509) POST /api/directory/contacts/{id}/qr/handoff returns CBOR card with TTL=600s + Ed25519 signature. (REQ-510) POST /api/directory/contacts/import-handoff validates signature against source bridge's known pubkey + adds contact with trust_level=1 (operator must verify per spec/005 for higher). (REQ-511) in-memory dedup set on card_id for 600s window. (REQ-512) reject expired cards with 400. (REQ-513) audit handoff_exported/imported/replay_rejected.
